case_for: Rodgers has cleared 12 points in four of his last five games, including a 30.1-point explosion in week 15, showing his floor has risen as the Jets' passing volume increased late in the season.
case_against: His week 10 dud of 4.0 points shows the volatility and downside risk still present, and hitting exactly 12.8 in his most recent outing suggests he's hovering right at the threshold rather than comfortably above it.
